Focus Tracker.name: Focus Tracker
details: Developed a focus tracker that punishes users through audio when a phone is detected
Wrote Python script to automatically capture photos and save them locally using OpenCV
Collected, processed, and labelled object detection boxes for 827 images using Roboflow
Incorporated YOLOv5 to train the model and detect phones in webcam feed
Achieved mAP of 98.4%, precision of 96.9%, and recall of 96.4%

PicToPlate.name: PicToPlate
details: Developed a computer vision app that analyzes images of food and provides caloric information
Utilized the OpenAI API to generate recipes based on detected ingredients in image
Used an AI webserver provided by EyePop.ai to generate a list of detected fruits and vegetables
Won 1st place in an artificial intelligence/computer vision hackathon with a team of two others

F1 Alexa Skill.name: F1 Alexa Skill
details: Developed an Alexa skill that tells users the time remaining until the next Formula 1 Grand Prix
Created relevant intents, sample utterances, and slots through the Alexa Developer Console
Used Python to parse F1 schedule data fetched from the Ergast F1 API

Anti-Podal Calculator.name: Anti-Podal Calculator
details: Developed a web app that finds anti-podal location (location on opposite side of the planet)
Used Streamlit to create map that displays both user location and anti-podal location
Used reverse geocode library and GeoPy to indentify nearest countries when in water
Utilized Streamlit Share and Github to deploy web app
